input.question: Which department received the most total scholarship money each academic year?

payload.question: Which department received the most total scholarship money each academic year?

output.sql:
WITH dept_totals AS (
  SELECT
    s.academic_year AS academic_year,
    s.department AS department,
    SUM(s.amount) AS total_scholarship
  FROM scholarships s
  GROUP BY s.academic_year, s.department
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    dt.academic_year AS academic_year,
    dt.department AS department,
    dt.total_scholarship AS total_scholarship,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY dt.academic_year ORDER BY dt.total_scholarship DESC) AS rn
  FROM dept_totals dt
)
SELECT
  r.academic_year AS academic_year,
  r.department AS department,
  r.total_scholarship AS total_scholarship
FROM ranked r
WHERE r.rn = 1
ORDER BY r.academic_year ASC;

visualization.description: Department with the highest total scholarship per academic year
visualization.title: Top Department by Total Scholarship Each Academic Year

payload.sql:
WITH dept_totals AS (
  SELECT
    s.academic_year AS academic_year,
    s.department AS department,
    SUM(s.amount) AS total_scholarship
  FROM scholarships s
  GROUP BY s.academic_year, s.department
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    dt.academic_year AS academic_year,
    dt.department AS department,
    dt.total_scholarship AS total_scholarship,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY dt.academic_year ORDER BY dt.total_scholarship DESC) AS rn
  FROM dept_totals dt
)
SELECT
  r.academic_year AS academic_year,
  r.department AS department,
  r.total_scholarship AS total_scholarship
FROM ranked r
WHERE r.rn = 1
ORDER BY r.academic_year ASC;
